UpdateBlbUdpListener.listenerPort: Listening port of the listener, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
UpdateBlbUdpListener.backendPort: Listening port of the backend server, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
UpdateBlbUdpListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports three modes: "RoundRobin" / "LeastConnection" / "Hash"; "RoundRobin" indicates weighted round-robin, "LeastConnection" indicates least connections, "Hash" indicates source-IP-based hashing
UpdateBlbUdpListener.healthCheckPort: Health check port, configurable when the health check protocol is "UDP"
UpdateBlbUdpListener.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout in seconds, default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
UpdateBlbUdpListener.healthCheckInterval: Health check interval in seconds, default is 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
UpdateBlbUdpListener.unhealthyThreshold: Unhealthy threshold: number of consecutive health check failures after which the backend server is blocked; default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateBlbUdpListener.healthyThreshold: Healthy threshold: number of consecutive health check successes after which the backend server is restored to available; default is 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
UpdateBlbUdpListener.healthCheckString: Request string sent during health check; the backend server must respond upon receipt; supports standard escape sequences such as \\00 and \\xf2 for binary format requests; required when the health check protocol is "UDP"
UpdateBlbUdpListener.udpSessionTimeout: UDP session timeout in seconds, default is 90, must be an integer between 5 and 4000
